@mnelson1979 its called a boycott generated from corporate greed. hence my comment.

replies.author: @mnelson1979
replies.text:
@dustinherk8124 they could sell tickets for a bajillion for the cheap seats and it would still have no bearing on television ratings.  "corporate greed" is such a stupid statement.  People will buy tickets if they can afford it and want to go.  It's called 'the market.'  The price per ticket the 50k fans that attend the game is a drop in the bucket compared to other revenue the NFL will make, from TV.  

Really all that is to say your comparison of 10k ticket prices and 'ratings collapse' is invalid and pointlessly made.
